title: V3Unroll won't unroll constify genvar variables underneath a AstAttrOf

features.name: generate for loop with genvar declaration
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop that declares and uses a genvar variable as the iteration index
features.snippet:
genvar loop1;
generate
  for (loop1 = 0; loop1 < 4; loop1 = loop1 + 1) begin
  end
endgenerate

features.name: nested generate for loops
features.description: Code should include nested generate for loops where an outer generate for loop contains an inner generate for loop
features.snippet:
genvar loop1, loop2;
generate
  for (loop1 = 0; loop1 < 4; loop1 = loop1 + 1) begin
    for (loop2 = 0; loop2 < 4; loop2 = loop2 + 1) begin
    end
  end
endgenerate

features.name: genvar as index in hierarchical attribute access
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop whose genvar variable is used as an index inside a hierarchical reference or attribute access expression

features.name: indexed hierarchical access via dot operator in generate loop
features.description: Code should include an indexed array or interface element accessed via a dot member operator using a genvar as part of the index expression inside a generate loop
